description: User examines the survey results for the task 'What do you think a reasonable minimum withdrawal amount would be?' with a rating filter applied.
page_title: Participant App: Wallet Core Flows & Expectations

description: User clicks the 'hide filter' icon in the Filters sidebar to disable the active rating filter.
frame_description: The cursor is positioned over the eye icon next to the filter 'How important is it to you to be able t...'

description: The bar chart and response list update to show all 20 responses instead of the filtered 5.
User reviews the unfiltered survey results.
User clicks the 'show filter' icon to re-enable the rating filter.
User continues to examine the filtered survey results.
User selects the task 'What would you be more likely to do?' from the left sidebar, updating the main view.
interaction_target: Task: What would you be more likely to do?

description: User examines the survey results for the newly selected task 'What would you be more likely to do?'.
User clicks the 'hide filter' icon in the Filters sidebar to disable the rating filter again.
User clicks the 'show filter' icon to immediately re-enable the rating filter.
User hovers over the next task 'View your transaction history' in the sidebar.
